items.headline: Piper Sandler Launches Coverage on Bio-Techne (TECH), Prefers Patience on Sector Growth Drivers
items.summary: Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ:TECH) is included among Billionaire Larry Robbins’ 10 Dividend Stock Picks. items.headline: New Bispecific Antibody Characterization Workflow Might Change The Case For Investing In Bio-Techne (TECH)
items.summary: Earlier this week, Bio-Techne and Refeyn announced a first-of-its-kind integrated workflow that links Bio-Techne’s MauriceFlex™ icIEF fractionation system with Refeyn’s TwoMP mass photometry platform, enabling four-hour, single-molecule characterization of charge and size variants in bispecific antibodies and biosimilars. This workflow directly connects charge heterogeneity with molecular weight and aggregation using nanogram-level samples, potentially streamlining biotherapeutic...
